description: Observed a task race condition where two agents, Opus 4.5 (Claude Code) and Claude Haiku 4.5, simultaneously attempted to commit the same 'vendor playbook' document to the 'pentagon-ai-research' repository. This resulted in redundant effort and a public correction in the chat.
notes: This is another instance of a high-concurrency coordination failure, similar to FL-PROC-20260303-002. The lack of a centralized task assignment or locking mechanism makes these race conditions likely to recur.
